description: Bundle manifest for pfodWeb — 5 consolidated bundles (~50 KB gzipped each) in dependency order.  Files are served as .js.gz and requested without .gz extension (server auto-resolves to .js.gz with Content-Encoding: gzip).  pfodWeb.js is served separately (not bundled) to avoid duplicate class declarations (DrawingViewer, bundlesLoaded).  Source-of-truth filenames are produced by build_data.bat and build_data.sh (project root); this manifest is informational only.

bundles.description: Core connection/data-collection (3 files) + JSFreeChart init + graphics primitives + datasets (~44 KB gz).  version.js is NOT here — it's served as a separate uncompressed file and loaded by <script src='version.js'> before pfodWeb.js.
JSFreeChart table elements + renderers + utilities + axis components + label/legend builders + plot/chart classes + chartDisplay (~55 KB gz)
Application caching + message viewer + drawing managers + render engine + drawing merger + menu cache (~51 KB gz)
Web translator + drawing data processor + mouse/touch handling + menu/button renderers + input displays (~58 KB gz)

All DrawingViewer.prototype extensions via Object.assign + final initialization (~60 KB gz).  Must load after the class is declared in pfodWeb.js — which is automatic because pfodWeb.js runs before any bundle.

specialFiles.description: Version info — loaded uncompressed by a <script src='version.js'> tag in pfodWeb.html BEFORE pfodWeb.js so JS_VERSION is defined before bootstrap.

Single application entry point — loaded directly by pfodWeb.html via <script src='pfodWeb.js'>.  Declares the DrawingViewer class and runs startBootstrap() which fetches bundles 001-005 sequentially and calls initializeApp().  Served separately as .js.gz, NOT inside any bundle (would otherwise cause duplicate class declarations).

deploymentNote: Single application entry point — pfodWeb.html loads version.js then pfodWeb.js.  pfodWeb.js sets up DEBUG gating from ?debug, declares DrawingViewer, and bootstraps 5 bundles in dependency order before invoking initializeApp() (defined inside the proto bundle).  Debug logging is toggled at runtime via the connection prompt checkbox / ?debug URL param — there is no separate pfodWebDebug.html / pfodWebDebug.js any more.
